2266090.name: Cube
2266090.description:
New Overpopulation Solution?

Myalin Institute of Science have recently proposed their Cube™ as a solution to world overpopulation.
"We have been working on this project for over 20 years. And we finally consider it almost done." - says the CEO
They have also recently opened their new program, where you can live in their Cube for 30 days.
If you are interested, then call Myalin Institute of Science's Volunteering Department

Volunteer Checklist

  • Solve puzzles
  • Explore the Cube
  • Find Secrets
  • Uncover what happened to everyone
